sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Redwood Trust (RWT) director receives 4,595.960 Deferred Stock Units as compensation
feed.summary: Redwood Trust director Georganne Proctor received 4,595.960 Deferred Stock Units as compensation, fully vested at grant, under the company's Amended and Restated Executive Deferred Compensation Plan. These units, linked to Redwood Trust common stock, were granted at a stated price of $0.0000 per unit and have no expiration date. This transaction represents her entire reported Deferred Stock Unit position following the grant.

feed.title: bioAffinity Technologies Appoints Three New Medical and Scientific Advisory Board Members
feed.summary: bioAffinity Technologies has expanded its Medical and Scientific Advisory Board with the appointment of three new members: Drs. David Ost, Daniel Sterman, and J. Scott Ferguson. These appointments aim to align the board with the company's clinical, scientific, and commercial priorities, particularly for its noninvasive lung cancer diagnostic test, CyPath Lung. The new members are highly respected leaders in pulmonary medicine and lung cancer care, and their expertise will support the integration and adoption of CyPath Lung for early lung cancer detection.

feed.title: TAC Financials: Revenue Breakdown, Margins & Competitor Comparison
feed.summary: TransAlta Corp (TAC) generates most of its revenue from Gas, accounting for 53.0% of total sales, followed by Energy Transition and Hydro. The company displays a gross margin of 17.71%, with operating and net margins in negative territory, and a Return on Equity of -30.13%. TAC, with a market capitalization of $3.77B, competes with companies like TXNM and KEN, and its gross margin is significantly lower than TXNM's but comparable to KEN's.

feed.title: BioAtla Announces 50-for-1 Share Consolidation
feed.summary: BioAtla, Inc. announced a 50-for-1 share consolidation of its common stock to increase its per-share trading price and regain compliance with Nasdaq's $1.00 minimum bid price requirement. This strategic move, effective April 6, 2026, aims to maintain the company's Nasdaq listing, which is crucial for accessing capital markets and funding ongoing research and development. Stockholders approved the consolidation on March 23, 2026, with fractional shares to be paid in cash.

The current price of BDCZ is listed at 14.758.

feed.title: Second Circuit Curtails Securities Act Claims, Holding That Reverse Split Was Not a “Sale” and Post-Split Notes Could Not Be Traced
feed.summary: The Second Circuit Court of Appeals ruled that Barclays PLC's mandatory 4:1 reverse split of exchange-traded notes (ETNs) did not constitute a "sale" under Section 12(a)(1) of the Securities Act, as it did not fundamentally change the investment's nature and investors had no choice. The court also held that investors failed the tracing requirement for a Section 11 claim, reinforcing limits on private Securities Act claims, especially for mechanical corporate actions. This decision provides clarity for issuers but also emphasizes the ongoing importance of robust registration compliance.

feed.title: Director at Better Home (NASDAQ: BETR) awarded 1,176 RSUs
feed.summary: Hugh R. Frater, a director at Better Home & Finance Holding Co. (NASDAQ: BETR), has been awarded 1,176 restricted stock units (RSUs) tied to Class A common stock. These RSUs will vest on the business day immediately preceding the company's next annual meeting of stockholders and were granted as equity compensation with a transaction price of $0.00 per unit. Following this transaction, Frater holds 1,176 restricted stock units directly.

feed.title: Director at Brookfield Business Corp (BBU) disposes partnership units in court-approved share exchange
feed.summary: Patricia L. Zuccotti, a director at Brookfield Business Corp (BBU), disposed of 3,235 Class A exchangeable subordinate voting shares and 4,961 non-voting limited partnership units on March 27, 2026. These dispositions were part of a court-approved corporate reorganization, not open-market transactions, where unit holders received Class A subordinated voting shares of Brookfield Business Corporation on a one-for-one basis. This reorganization established Brookfield Business Partners L.P. and Brookfield Business Holdings Corporation as subsidiaries of Brookfield Business Corporation.

feed.title: Brookfield Business (BBU) director logs issuer dispositions in court-approved reorganization
feed.summary: Brookfield Business director David John Hamill reported the disposition of 3,895 Class A Exchangeable Subordinate Voting Shares and 12,441 Non-Voting Limited Partnership Units through Auraway Pty Ltd. These transactions, priced at $0.00 per unit, were issuer-driven restructurings under a court-approved plan of arrangement dated November 6, 2025. This arrangement resulted in the units being exchanged for Class A subordinated voting shares of Brookfield Business Corporation, making BBU and BBHC subsidiaries of the Corporation.

feed.title: Director in Brookfield Business Corp (BBU) records unit-for-share exchange

This transaction was part of a court-approved corporate reorganization on March 27, 2026, where these securities were exchanged on a one-for-one basis for class A subordinated voting shares of Brookfield Business Corp. Subsequent to the arrangement, Brookfield Business Partners L.P. and Brookfield Business Holdings Corporation became subsidiaries of Brookfield Business Corp.

feed.title: BBVA Cancels 75 Million Treasury Shares in Partial Capital Reduction
feed.summary: BBVA has executed a partial share capital reduction by cancelling 74,963,302 treasury shares, acquired under its buyback program. This move reduces the bank's share capital to approximately EUR 2.76 billion, without returning cash to shareholders, thereby concentrating ownership and signalling capital optimization. The operation complies with Spanish law, with no creditor opposition rights, as the reduction is charged to unrestricted reserves.

feed.title: Battalion Oil (BATL) Form 144: 1.8M common shares proposed for resale

The filing details sales activity by Luminus Management LLC, executed through Height Securities LLC, on March 30 and March 31, 2026, totaling over 1.7 million shares with significant gross proceeds.

This notification ensures compliance with securities rules for issuers filing Form 12b-25.

feed.title: Richard Peterson, Universal Insurance director, sells $68k in UVE stock
feed.summary: Richard Peterson, a director at Universal Insurance Holdings (NYSE:UVE), sold 2,000 shares of company stock for approximately $68,207 on March 30, 2026. This sale occurred after UVE shares surged 48% over the past year. Despite the insider sale, the stock maintains a low P/E ratio, and the company recently reported strong Q4 2025 EPS, significantly exceeding analyst expectations.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Investigates Claims On Behalf of Investors of AeroVironment, ...
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP is investigating AeroVironment, Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAV) regarding potential securities fraud and unlawful business practices. This investigation follows significant drops in AeroVironment's stock price after the company reported disappointing financial results for its second fiscal quarter of 2026 and after Raymond James downgraded the stock due to uncertainty surrounding a major U.S. Space Force contract. Further stock price declines occurred after the announcement of a Q3 operating loss, which included a $165.5 million goodwill impairment related to the same Space Force program.

feed.title: Safe Pro Group 10-K: Revenues $0.61M, EPS $(0.85)
feed.summary: Safe Pro Group (SPAI) reported fiscal-year revenues of $0.607 million, a significant 72% decrease year-over-year, and a net loss per share of $(0.85). The decline was primarily due to reduced drone services and PPE sales, despite modest AI revenue growth. The company also experienced a widening operating shortfall and increased R&D and commercial activities, with plans for further expansion in 2026.

feed.title: VanEck Semiconductor ETF Options Spot-On: On March 31st, 127.09K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.02 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 31st, the VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH.US) saw significant options trading with 127.09K contracts traded, where put options made up 62.53% of transactions. The open interest for SMH reached approximately 1.02 million contracts, representing 83.85% of its 30-day average. A notable trade included 4,000 put option contracts with a strike price of $250.00 expiring on January 15th, 2027, highlighting unusual option activity.

feed.title: COO Robert Wunar of Ultra Clean Holdings (UCTT) files initial Form 3

This filing establishes his reporting position as an officer and outlines his beneficial ownership status in the company's securities. The Form 3 indicates no equity transactions or changes in holdings at this time, serving purely as an initial declaration of his insider status without reporting any stock activities.

feed.title: authID 2025 10-K: Revenue $2.04M, EPS $(1.38)
feed.summary: authID reported fiscal 2025 net revenue of $2.04 million and a net loss per share of $(1.38), primarily driven by new customer go-lives despite increased investment in R&D and G&A activities. The company recorded a net loss of $17.93 million as it expanded its biometric verification and identity products, with cash on hand at $4.61 million and operating cash outflows of $14.99 million. Revenue growth was noted from $0.89 million in 2024, alongside strategic concessions to maintain customer relationships.

feed.title: Algoma Steel guides to Q1 EBITDA loss of $25M-$35M | ASTL Stock News
feed.summary: Algoma Steel Group Inc. has provided Q1 2026 guidance, expecting total steel shipments of approximately 220,000 tons and an Adjusted EBITDA loss ranging from $25 million to $35 million. This guidance includes a $90-$95 million capacity utilization adjustment related to the Electric Arc Furnace (EAF) ramp-up. The company has completed its transition to EAF steelmaking after investing nearly $1 billion and is now producing its low-carbon Volta brand steel continuously.

feed.title: ASML Holding NV Stock (ASML) Closed Up by 5.32% on Mar 31: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: ASML Holding NV (ASML) stock rose by 5.32% on March 31, driven by strong demand for its EUV lithography tools, a significant order from SK Hynix, and an upgraded price target from Bernstein. The semiconductor industry's robust outlook, projecting $1 trillion in sales by 2026 due to AI infrastructure growth, further supports ASML's critical market position. Investors are anticipating ASML's Q1 2026 results and a reiterated "buy" rating from JPMorgan Chase & Co.

This notification allows SOBR Safe a temporary extension without being marked as delinquent.

feed.title: Arrow Electronics Launches Unified Digital Platform for Customers
feed.summary: Arrow Electronics has successfully integrated its global components business customer digital platforms, launching a redesigned arrow.com to offer a unified procurement and engineering experience. This new platform replaces the former MyArrow portal and integrates technical design engineering and supply chain services to enhance user engagement and simplify transactions. The strategic upgrade is expected to attract more traditional offline customers and improve overall customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

This transaction was executed under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on March 14, 2025. Following the sale, Aziz retains a significant direct ownership of 224,549 Asana shares.

feed.title: Assembly Biosciences (ASMB) CMO awarded 26,000 RSUs vesting through 2030
feed.summary: Assembly Biosciences' Chief Medical Officer, Anuj Gaggar, was granted 26,000 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as part of his annual equity compensation. These RSUs will vest in four equal installments annually from March 29, 2027, through March 29, 2030, provided he remains with the company. This grant represents 65% of his annual equity award, with the remaining 35% contingent on stockholder approval of an increase in shares authorized under the company's 2018 stock incentive plan.

feed.title: Soleno Therapeutics Investors Seek Compensation After Losses
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (SLNO) by Robbins LLP on behalf of investors who experienced losses due to a decline in the company's stock price. The lawsuit alleges that Soleno Therapeutics made misleading statements regarding its business and financial performance, particularly about its lead drug candidate, causing artificial inflation of its stock. When setbacks in the drug's development were disclosed, the stock price plummeted, resulting in significant investor losses.

feed.title: AVITA Medical (RCEL) files $200M S-3 shelf to sell stock, warrants
feed.summary: AVITA Medical, Inc. (RCEL) has filed an S-3 shelf registration statement to offer up to $200 million in common stock, preferred stock, warrants, and units. The company intends to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including capital expenditures and working capital. Specific terms of each offering, such as pricing and distribution methods, will be detailed in future prospectus supplements.

feed.title: Academy Sports leaders map long-term strategy in April 7 webcast
feed.summary: Academy Sports + Outdoors (NASDAQ: ASO) announced it will host an Analyst Day on April 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. CEO Steve Lawrence, CFO Carl Ford, and Chief Customer Officer Chad Fox will present the company’s long-term strategy and growth initiatives. A live webcast and presentation materials will be available on the company's investor relations website, with a replay archived for approximately 30 days.

feed.title: Sandisk to Report Fiscal Third Quarter Results on April 30, 2026
feed.summary: Sandisk Corporation announced it will host its fiscal third quarter earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time. A live webcast and replay of the call will be available on the company's investor relations website. This announcement also includes information about Sandisk's participation in upcoming investor conferences and details of a secondary offering of common stock.

feed.title: Smith-Midland (NASDAQ: SMID) delays 2025 10-K; forecasts revenue up 18%
feed.summary: Smith-Midland Corporation (NASDAQ: SMID) announced a delay in filing its 2025 Form 10-K, citing the need to complete financial closing procedures, auditing, and an assessment of internal controls over financial reporting, which may reveal a material weakness. Despite the delay, the company provided preliminary guidance forecasting Q4 2025 revenue of $22–$24 million and full-year 2025 revenue of $92–$94 million, representing an 18% increase at the midpoint. This preliminary guidance suggests record annual net income, though all figures are subject to audit adjustments.

feed.title: Battery recycler Aqua Metals says new process can double lithium output
feed.summary: Aqua Metals reported significant 2025 progress in commercializing its AquaRefining™ technology, expanding product lines for lithium, nickel, and MHP, and demonstrating pilot-scale LFP recycling. The company raised $17.1 million, ended the year with $10.8 million cash, and advanced plans for a commercial AquaRefining Campus. Key achievements include producing battery-grade lithium carbonate with low fluorine content and contributing to the first cathode made from 100% domestically recycled nickel.

feed.title: ATGL (ATGL) president reports Class A and Class B share stakes in Form 3

The filing indicates direct ownership of 397,500 Class A Ordinary Shares and 1,200,000 Class B Ordinary Shares. This report establishes his starting position for insider reporting purposes and does not reflect any new transactions.

feed.title: [Form 3] Alpha Technology Group Ltd Initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership
feed.summary: Alpha Technology Group Ltd director Li John filed an initial Form 3, reporting no beneficial ownership of either class of the company’s shares. The filing indicates zero Class A Ordinary Shares and zero Class B Ordinary Shares are held directly by Li John.
